title: Island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet
summary: A continuity sheet for island or coastal households when ferries, pharmacies, clinics, or couriers are delayed and medicine supply may run short.
content:
A continuity sheet for island or coastal households when ferries, pharmacies, clinics, or couriers are delayed and medicine supply may run short.

This card improves island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet by making the action small, visible, and reversible. It helps a tired group avoid hidden assumptions while preserving emergency-service priority.

Core sequence: 1) List medicines by person, days remaining, storage needs, prescriber, pharmacy, and island or mainland backup contact. 2) Start calls early when weather, strikes, ferry changes, or holidays threaten the normal refill path. 3) Ask for professional advice before substituting, splitting, stopping, or changing any medicine. 4) Record every call result with date, name, and next promised action.

Stop point: Do not use island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet to bypass emergency responders, utility professionals, medical advice, or evacuation instructions.

separate safe place linked to Island · Medicine ferry delay

steps: List medicines by person, days remaining, storage needs, prescriber, pharmacy, and island or mainland backup contact.
Start calls early when weather, strikes, ferry changes, or holidays threaten the normal refill path.
Ask for professional advice before substituting, splitting, stopping, or changing any medicine.
Record every call result with date, name, and next promised action.
warnings: Do not continue island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet if the action increases fire, fumes, contamination, injury, violence, or official-order risk.
Do not leave island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet dependent on a single tired person without a written handover.
common_mistakes: Using island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet without checking the weakest person first makes the routine look complete while help is still missing.
Changing island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet verbally without changing the visible note creates two competing versions.
alternatives: If island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet cannot be done as planned, reduce it to a marked safe area, one named owner, and one next review.
If equipment for island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet is missing, use observation, distance, labeling, and official help instead of improvised high-risk repair.
failure_signs: The visible note for island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet no longer matches what people are actually doing.
Someone says they assumed island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet was handled, but no time, owner, or result is written.
when_not_to_use: Do not use island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet to bypass emergency responders, utility professionals, medical advice, or evacuation instructions.
Do not continue island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet inside smoke, floodwater, sewage, unstable walls, or a location with suspected gas or electrical danger.
short_term: Before moving on, make the first result of island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet visible and confirm one person can explain it in under thirty seconds.
long_term: After real use, improve island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet by replacing unclear wording, weak storage choices, and unsafe shortcuts with local practice notes.
if_method_fails: If island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet fails, mark the unsafe part unavailable, retreat to the last safe option, and request official or qualified support when needed.
environment_notes: Adapt island medicine ferry-delay contact sheet to apartment blocks, farms, islands, camps, shops, ferries, heat, smoke, low light, noise, and mobility limits.
